reproducible_artifact: A team-level closed-buddhi diagnostic: at end of each quarter, list (a) all architecture proposals received, (b) those that produced roadmap change, (c) those where situational reality required the change. The metric is the size of (b minus c). Trigger-based re-evaluation calendar is the operational instrument: every proposal kept open requires a measurable threshold for re-evaluation.
verdict_reason: Reproducible at team level. The trigger-based re-evaluation calendar is a concrete artifact teams can adopt; the closed-buddhi diagnostic is a quarterly retrospective question. The implication field operationalizes the metric. Pass.
